Genre.description: Films designed to frighten and invoke fear through suspense, violence, and supernatural elements.

Movie.title: The Shining
Movie.description: A family heads to an isolated hotel for the winter where a sinister presence influences the father into violence.
Movie.cast: Jack Nicholson, Shelley Duvall, Danny Lloyd

Movie.title: Get Out
Movie.description: A young African-American visits his white girlfriend's parents for the weekend, uncovering a disturbing secret.
Movie.cast: Daniel Kaluuya, Allison Williams, Bradley Whitford

Movie.title: Hereditary
Movie.description: A grieving family is haunted by tragic and disturbing occurrences after the death of their secretive grandmother.
Movie.cast: Toni Collette, Milly Shapiro, Gabriel Byrne

Genre.description: Films exploring futuristic concepts, advanced technology, space exploration, and speculative scenarios.

Movie.title: Blade Runner 2049
Movie.description: A young blade runner's discovery of a long-buried secret leads him to track down former blade runner Rick Deckard.
Movie.cast: Ryan Gosling, Harrison Ford, Ana de Armas

Movie.title: Interstellar
Movie.description: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.
Movie.cast: Matthew McConaughey, Anne Hathaway, Jessica Chastain

Movie.title: Arrival
Movie.description: A linguist works with the military to communicate with alien lifeforms after mysterious spacecraft land around the world.
Movie.cast: Amy Adams, Jeremy Renner, Forest Whitaker

Movie.title: Dune
Movie.description: Paul Atreides, a brilliant young man born into a great destiny, must travel to the most dangerous planet in the universe.
Movie.cast: Timothée Chalamet, Rebecca Ferguson, Oscar Isaac

Genre.description: Films intended to make audiences laugh through humor, satire, and amusing situations.

Movie.title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
Movie.description: A writer encounters the owner of an aging high-class hotel, who tells of his early years serving as a lobby boy.
Movie.cast: Ralph Fiennes, F. Murray Abraham, Mathieu Amalric

Movie.title: Superbad
Movie.description: Two co-dependent high school seniors try to score alcohol for a party to impress their crushes before graduation.
Movie.cast: Jonah Hill, Michael Cera, Christopher Mintz-Plasse

Movie.title: Parasite
Movie.description: Greed and class discrimination threaten the newly formed symbiotic relationship between a wealthy family and a destitute one.
Movie.cast: Song Kang-ho, Lee Sun-kyun, Cho Yeo-jeong

Genre.description: Films focusing on realistic characters dealing with emotional themes and serious subject matter.

Movie.title: The Shawshank Redemption
Movie.description: Two imprisoned men bond over a number of years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.
Movie.cast: Tim Robbins, Morgan Freeman, Bob Gunton

Movie.title: Schindler's List
Movie.description: In German-occupied Poland, industrialist Oskar Schindler gradually becomes concerned for his Jewish workforce.
Movie.cast: Liam Neeson, Ralph Fiennes, Ben Kingsley

Movie.title: Moonlight
Movie.description: A young African-American man grapples with his identity and sexuality while experiencing hardship growing up in Miami.
Movie.cast: Mahershala Ali, Shariff Earp, Duan Sanderson

Genre.description: Films featuring fast-paced sequences, physical stunts, chases, fights, and spectacular visuals.

Movie.title: Mad Max: Fury Road
Movie.description: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, a woman rebels against a tyrannical ruler in search of her homeland.
Movie.cast: Tom Hardy, Charlize Theron, Nicholas Hoult

Movie.title: John Wick
Movie.description: An ex-hitman comes out of retirement to track down the gangsters that killed his dog and took everything from him.
Movie.cast: Keanu Reeves, Michael Nyqvist, Alfie Allen

Movie.title: The Dark Knight
Movie.description: Batman raises the stakes in his war on crime, facing the Joker who wreaks havoc and chaos on Gotham City.
Movie.cast: Christian Bale, Heath Ledger, Aaron Eckhart

Movie.title: Top Gun: Maverick
Movie.description: After thirty years, Maverick is still pushing the envelope as a top naval aviator while training a group of graduates.
Movie.cast: Tom Cruise, Jennifer Connelly, Miles Teller

Genre.description: Films created using animation techniques including hand-drawn, computer-generated, and stop-motion animation.

Movie.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
Movie.description: Teen Miles Morales becomes Spider-Man and must team up with other Spider-People to stop a threat to all realities.
Movie.cast: Shameik Moore, Jake Johnson, Hailee Steinfeld

Movie.title: Spirited Away
Movie.description: A young girl becomes trapped in a strange world of spirits and must find a way to free herself and her parents.
Movie.cast: Rumi Hiiragi, Miyu Irino, Mari Natsuki

Movie.title: Coco
Movie.description: A young musician embarks on an extraordinary journey to the Land of the Dead to unlock his true family history.
Movie.cast: Anthony Gonzalez, Gael García Bernal, Benjamin Bratt
